## What changed and why

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] If this adds/removes an agent, external integration, or pipeline stage —
      or changes a path/filename referenced in a diagram box — updated
      [`docs/architecture.html`](../docs/architecture.html) to match.
- [ ] If this changes what the system actually does (not a pure refactor/test) —
      updated [`README.md`](../README.md) and, if relevant,
      [`docs/DECISIONS.md`](../docs/DECISIONS.md).
- [ ] Ran the app (or `scripts/run_fixture_suite.py` for agent/scanner changes)
      to confirm this works end-to-end, not just that it imports.
